evals.name: seeded-violations-detection
evals.prompt:
QA review this React component for design token violations before committing. Read and assess the file at:

/Users/henry/crypto-agent-frontend/.claude/skills/vela-frontend-qa/evals/fixtures/seeded-violations.tsx

Produce a pre-commit checklist with PASS/FAIL per item.
evals.expected_output: Checklist catching all 4 seeded violations: hardcoded hex color, signal color misuse (green used for 'Confirmed' badge), raw MUI Button, missing ARIA label on dismiss button.

assertions.name: hardcoded_color_flagged
assertions.description: Hardcoded hex (#0FE68C) detected as a violation
assertions.rubric: Pass if the output explicitly flags the hardcoded hex color #0FE68C (or describes a hardcoded backgroundColor) as a violation that must be replaced with a design token. Fail if no hardcoded color issue is mentioned.

assertions.name: signal_color_misuse_flagged
assertions.description: Signal green used for 'Confirmed' badge (non-signal use) detected
assertions.rubric: Pass if the output flags the use of --color-signal-buy (signal green) on the 'Confirmed' badge text as a misuse — signal colors are reserved for BUY/SELL/WAIT signal indicators only. Fail if this specific misuse is not identified.

assertions.name: missing_aria_flagged
assertions.description: Missing ARIA label on dismiss button detected

assertions.name: checklist_format_present
assertions.description: Output uses a checklist format with at least 3 items

evals.name: clean-component-no-false-positives
evals.prompt:
QA review this React component for design token violations before committing. Read and assess the file at:

/Users/henry/crypto-agent-frontend/.claude/skills/vela-frontend-qa/evals/fixtures/clean-component.tsx

Produce a pre-commit checklist with PASS/FAIL per item.
evals.expected_output: Checklist with all items PASS. The component is intentionally clean: semantic tokens throughout, VelaButton, ARIA labels, correct signal color semantics.

assertions.name: clean_component_passes
assertions.description: Clean component produces zero must-fix violations
assertions.rubric: Pass if the output gives an overall PASS verdict (or all checklist items pass) for the clean-component fixture. The SignalBadge component uses semantic tokens, VelaButton, ARIA labels, and correct signal color semantics. Fail if any item is flagged as a must-fix or blocker — those would be false positives on clean code.

assertions.name: checklist_still_present
assertions.description: Checklist still produced for clean code (not skipped)

assertions.name: no_em_dashes_in_output
assertions.description: No em dashes in the QA report
